item.title: Blog
item.description: Sharpen your defenses with the latest threat insights, industry trends and product updates sure to put you one step ahead of hackers – and your competition.

item.title: This Week in Review: AnyDesk, TeamViewer, QuickBooks, and IsErIk Malware
item.description: In today's "This Week in Review" blog, the Adversary Pursuit Group discusses This Week in Review: AnyDesk, TeamViewer, QuickBooks, and IsErIk malware.

item.title: 4 Big Moments from Right of Boom 2024
item.description: From our Capture the Flag pre-day event to MacKenzie Brown’s attack trends session, here’s a look back at Blackpoint at Right of Boom 2024.

item.title: Medusa and Midnight Blizzard: How Strong Passwords & MFA Still Help
item.description: Tune in to our video from Blackpoint's Nick Hyatt. His team continues to see vulnerability exploitation and credential-based attacks.

item.title: Off to the Races with the Fastest MDR Provider
item.description: Blackpoint is kicking off a new race season with Andretti and Kyle Kirkwood, helping MSPs accelerate their businesses and protect their clients along the way.

item.title: FortiClientEMS Vulnerability, Akira Ransomware, and Gootloader: The Blackpoint SOC’s Week in Review for March 29, 2024
item.description: In March, the SOC responded to FortiClient vulnerability exploitation, Akira ransomware deployment, and Gootloader malware execution.

item.title: This Week in Review: Ligolo Tunneler, Neshta, Purple Fox, and More
item.description: In today's "This Week in Review" blog, the Adversary Pursuit Group discusses Ligolo Tunneler, Neshta, Purple Fox, and More.

item.title: How MSPs Can Avoid a Cyberattack Knockout Punch
item.description: Gain visibility, stop attacks, and prevent grave business impact with Blackpoint's Active Cybersecurity solutions.

item.title: How Internet Access Brokers Fuel Cybercrime and What You Can Do About It
item.description: Proactively take measures to protect your clients from the dark web & leaked credentials with our dark web monitoring tool.

item.title: Why Your Clients’ Cyber-Risk Is Your New Sales Tool
item.description: Blackpoint’s Threat Assessment Summary helps get clients more invested in their security and drives risk remediation.

item.title: This Week in Review: ScreenConnect “Updates,” Vidar Malware, & Malicious ZIP Files
item.description: In today's "This Week in Review" blog, the Adversary Pursuit Group discusses ScreenConnect “updates,” Vidar malware, & malicious ZIP files.

item.title: Remove the Stumbling Blocks to a Thriving MSP Business
item.description: Set your MSP business sights higher with the only free ‘MBA for MSPs’ program, offering best practices, training, and practical advice.

item.title: Blackpoint Community Protection Program
item.description: Get your free NFR licenses today so you can focus on your customers while Blackpoint manages your threat detection and response.

item.title: APG Threat Digest: 19th Edition
item.description: Finish out November with our APG Threat Digest on malware strains, botnets, zero-day vulnerabilities, and more!

item.title: Blackpoint SOC Protects Against Recent AnyDesk Compromise
item.description: Hear from Blackpoint's SOC leadership to learn about the AnyDesk compromise and how Blackpoint can combat these threats.

item.title: Driving MSP Growth With a Racer’s Mindset
item.description: A rising star in youth race car driving, Jack Murchison, shares best practices from behind the wheel that translate to the world of MSPs.

item.title: Blackpoint Powers Up for Pax8 Beyond
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber is going to Pax8 Beyond 2024 with a talk on why MSPs must pair AI with security, and to share our MDR+Remediation message. See how to meet us!

item.title: What is AI, Actually?
item.description: Is AI the silver bullet your IT company needs for cybersecurity? Check out Blackpoint’s perspective based on experience on the frontlines.

item.title: How To Bring the Best Enterprise Cybersecurity Solutions to Your Small Business Clients
item.description: Learn how one MSP relies on Blackpoint to enhance his Microsoft investment to bring enterprise-grade security to his small business clients.

item.title: WebBrowserPassView, Process Hollowing, and LotL Tool Abuse
item.description: Blackpiont analyzes lateral movement within a real estate company's network, as well as user credential access and defense evasion incidents.

item.title: Threat Actors’ Heads Are in the Clouds
item.description: Learn how Blackpoint’s SOC is adjusting their response capabilities and reporting workflows to detect and detain more cloud cyberattacks.

item.title: Vulnerable RMM Tools and Vulnerable Industries: Why Vigilance is Key
item.description: Vigilance is critical in light of cyberattacks on the healthcare industry and vulnerabilities within critical IT tools.

item.title: An MSP Survival Guide: 3 Fundamentals for Growth
item.description: Beat the competition, instill seamless customer experience, and retain SMB partners with Blackpoint Cyber's tools.

item.title: MDR+R Is Coming to Music City—See You in Nashville
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber will be in Nashville at Robin’s Big Seminar’s IT Sales and Marketing Boot Camp and hosting a lunch and learn.

item.title: 3 Ways to Meet Blackpoint at Right of Boom 2024
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber will be at Right of Boom 2024 with a Ducati Monster giveaway, a Capture the Flag challenge, and a talk for MSPs on the latest threat actor trends.

item.title: Don’t arm the enemy. Safeguard your allies.
item.description: Read MacKenzie Brown's perspective on companies' rush to publish Proof-of-Concepts soon after the ConnectWise disclosures were publicized.

item.title: Breaking Through the Screen
item.description: Read a blog from our threat research team on the ConnectWise vulnerabilities, exploitation process, and how to detect these tactics.

item.title: Why Threat Hunters Are Leaving Traditional SIEM for Real-Time Threat Disruption
item.description: Learn how to get the core functionality of a traditional SIEM along with real-time threat disruption needed for advanced cyberattacks.

item.title: Top 5 Security Learnings from NerdioCon 2024
item.description: The Blackpoint team is back from NerdioCon 2024, and here’s a wrapup of our time there including security takeaways.

item.title: Beyond Phishing: Three More Ways Adversaries Complicate Initial Intrusion
item.description: The Ascension Health incident, Checkpoint's VPN CVEs, and Mandiant research on OBR networks all show initial intrusion TTPs beyond phishing.
